goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college. Make sure you get area, postcode, and phone number. You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called tandoori palace. Make sure you get phone number and address

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm here to visit some colleges, can you please help me find the addresses of some of them?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, I can get you the addresses.   There are five different colleges.  Did you have specific ones in mind?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Nothing in particular. Just give me the area, postcode, and phone for one of them.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Churchill college is located in the west postcode cb30ds. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I will need the phone number for them as well please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Their phone number is 01223336233	.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I also need a place to eat called tandoori palace.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The tandoori palace is on the East side. Would you like me to reserve for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No thank you. I would just like the phone number and address.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, the address is 68 Histon Road Chesterton, and the phone number is 01223506055.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you for your help. Have a great day.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: you're very welcome. you have a good day too.

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve mexican food. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves gastropub food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 2 people at 12:30 on tuesday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called corpus christi. Make sure you get area and postcode

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: i'm looking for a mexican restaurant

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have found one.  The Chiquito Restaurant Bar is in the south side of town.  Would you like me to make a reservation for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Is it expensive?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes it is. Would you like a reservation there?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Actually, I was looking for a Mexican restaurant in the centre of town.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'm sorry the only mexican restaurant is located in the south.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What about a gastropub?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We have 4 options! Is there a price range you'd like to stay in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I'm looking for a restaurant in the expensive price range in the city centre. Mexican is my first choice. If none is available, gastropub is fine.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Backstreet Bistro looks like a top choice, shall i book you for there?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes a table for four please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I will go ahead and book that for you.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you. Oh wait! It needs to be a table for 2.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: No problem.  What day and time were you thinking?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: We need a table for Tuesday at 12:30 please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are booked for Backstreet Bistro for 2 people. Your reference number is  P4P2R28V. May I help with something else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What is the address and postcode of the Backstreet Bistoro?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: They are located at 2 Sturton Street City Centre postal cb12qa, have I been able to resolve all of your questions today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I also want to find an attraction called Corpus Christi.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Corpus Christi is a college in town centre. It is located at king's parade, postcode cb21rh.  The entrance fee is 2 pounds. Do you need their phone number?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thanks for all your help. That will be all for today. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Have a great time.

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve gastropub food and should be in the expensive price range. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 16:00 on thursday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum and should be in the east. Make sure you get phone number, entrance fee, and address

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yeah, could you recommend a good gastropub?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Backstreet Bistro. It's expensive though. There is a moderately priced one called The Cow Pizza Kitchen and Bar if preferred.

non-categorical.value: The Cow Pizza Kitchen and Bar

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like to book a table at the Backstreet Bistro for 5 people at 16:00 on Thursday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: No problem.  That is booked for you and your reference number is 2VE84YC5.  Is there anything else I can book for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, any suggestions of museums found in the east area of town?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, Gallery at Twelve a High Street is excellent, and has free admission.  Would you like more information?

non-categorical.value: Gallery at Twelve a High Street

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can I please have the phone number and address for that place?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Certainly! The address for gallery at twelve a high street is fulbourn and the phone number is 01223295264. Can I help you with anything else?

non-categorical.value: gallery at twelve a high street

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Great that's all the information I needed today, thank you!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are very welcome.  Have a nice day.  Good bye.

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should serve light bites food. The restaurant should be in the centre. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves mediterranean food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 19:15 on monday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of mutliple sports and should be in the same area as the restaurant. If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of nightclub. Make sure you get postcode

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Please find a cheap place to eat that serves light bites food.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I am sorry I am not finding anything to match your criteria. Is there another food type you would be interested in?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What type of cheap restaurants do you have in the center?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 15 restaurants in the centre with a cheap price range, serving a variety of cuisines. Would Italian or Mediterranean cuisines be of interest?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Mediterranean sounds good.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The gardenia would suit you just right.  I would be happy to book a reservation for you if you would like?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, please make me a reservation.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: For what day would you like your reservation and what time?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: book a table for 6 people at 19:15 on monday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your reservation has been booked. Your reference number is S7WWFYCU. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I'm interested in seeing some attractions with sports. Is there any place with multiple sports in the Centre?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: no I am sorry

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What about a nightclub instead?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have five nightclubs. Would you like more info on one?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes.  Whichever you can recommend.  Please give me their postcode when you choose.  Thank you!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Then how about ballare? It's code is cb23na.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Could I get the postcode?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, the postcode is CB23NA. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No.  That's it.  Thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You're welcome. We hope you have a great trip, and feel free to contact us if you need additional help. Have a great day!

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thanks, you, too!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Let us know id you need any more help.

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the south and should be in the expensive price range. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 4 people at 15:45 on saturday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the restaurant. Make sure you get postcode

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm starving! Can you find me somewhere to eat on the south side of the city? Money is no object so please find me something expensive.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We have several options available to you. What type of cuisine would you prefer? We have Chinese, Indian, Italian, and Mexican as options.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Whichever one you recommend, as long as its expensive. I'll need a reservation for 4 at 15:45 on saturday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I was able to book you at the peking restaurant, the reference number is 3TFBGBP8, the table will be held for 15 minutes, is there anything else, that I can assist with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, could you please recommend some places to go after we get done eating that are near the restaurant as well?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The "Place" is a popular nightclub in the area.  There are also a couple of other entertainment options.

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The postcode for that attraction is cb23hg. Is there anything more I can help with today?

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thank you for contacting Cambridge TownInfo centre. Goodbye!
